one_time_description: Earnings from investment in Nation business entities (PFN 3 Feathers Development LP) - large increase from $3.9M to $13.3M driven by business enterprise income
economic_notes: Nation has investments in PFN 3 Feathers Development Limited Partnership (99%), PFN 3 Feathers Development Corporation (100%), and 1247835 B.C. Ltd (100%), accounted for using modified equity method. Business enterprises generated $13.27M net income in 2023. Member distributions of $965,000 included in administration expenses (2022: $5,787,001).
notes: Fiscal year is 2023 (year ended March 31, 2023), not 2024. Three GBEs accounted for by modified equity method: PFN 3 Feathers Development LP (99%), PFN 3 Feathers Development Corporation (100%), 1247835 B.C. Ltd (100%). Large jump in business enterprise earnings from $3.9M to $13.3M drove significant annual surplus. Member distributions of $965,000 included in administration (down from $5.79M prior year). ISC management review letter for FY2020 is under appeal - potential liability not recorded. First Nation was in violation of FNFTA submission deadline. No long-term debt. total_government_transfers calculated as ISC ($1,564,521) + First Nation Health Authority ($288,027) + FNESC ($97,233) + Province of BC ($3,540,159) + other government per segment ($279,672 implied difference) - used segment data: ISC $1,564,521 + Other government $4,205,091 = $5,769,612. osr = total revenue $25,593,370 minus government transfers $5,769,612 = $19,823,758.
